summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Plan Management CRUD, subscription plans from MongoDB Atlas, and frontend Admin Panel Plans tab. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Login page and Admin Panel Plans tab fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - returns healthy status
Backend: GET /api/providers - returns seed providers from MongoDB Atlas
Backend: GET /api/subscription/plans - returns 3 active plans from database
Backend: Plans have correct structure (plan_id, name, duration_months, price_clp, features, active)
Backend: Plans sorted by price ascending
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - admin login returns JWT token and role=admin
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - creates new user with role=client
Backend: GET /api/admin/plans - requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/admin/plans - returns all plans for admin
Backend: POST /api/admin/plans - creates new plan with active=true
Backend: PUT /api/admin/plans/{plan_id} - updates plan fields and sets updated_at
Backend: POST /api/admin/plans/{plan_id}/toggle - toggles active status
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/plans/{plan_id} - removes plan from database
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/plans/{nonexistent} - returns 404
Backend: Regular user cannot access /api/admin/plans (403 forbidden)
Backend: Inactive plans filtered from public endpoint, visible in admin endpoint
Frontend: /login page - email input, password input, login button, Google OAuth button, forgot password link, register link
Frontend: Admin login successful - redirects to dashboard
Frontend: /admin panel - shows stats (Users, Providers, Pending, Verified, Subscriptions)
Frontend: Admin Panel - 3 tabs (Pendientes, Proveedores, Planes)
Frontend: Plans tab - shows 3 seed plan cards with prices, duration, features
Frontend: Plans tab - Nuevo Plan button opens modal
Frontend: Plans tab - Edit/Delete/Toggle buttons visible for each plan
Frontend: Plan Modal - Name, Duration, Price, Features, Popular checkbox fields
Frontend: Plan Modal - Create plan works (saves to database, modal closes)
Frontend: Plan 3 Meses marked as 'Popular' badge

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages and features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Test plans created during testing were cleaned up after tests. 3 seed plans remain: plan_1month ($9,990), plan_3months ($24,990), plan_12months ($79,990).
context_for_next_testing_agent: MongoDB Atlas migration complete. Admin Plan CRUD fully functional. Login page has email form + Google OAuth. Admin Panel has 3 tabs: Pendientes (pending providers), Proveedores (all providers), Planes (subscription plans management). Plan Modal supports Create/Edit with Name, Duration, Price, Features, Popular checkbox. Admin credentials: admin@ucan.cl / admin123.

features_tested.subscription_plans_public: GET /api/subscription/plans returns 3 active plans sorted by price
features_tested.admin_plans_crud: Full CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete, Toggle) working with admin JWT auth
features_tested.providers_from_atlas: GET /api/providers returns 5 seed providers from MongoDB Atlas
features_tested.auth_endpoints: Login and Register working with MongoDB Atlas
features_tested.admin_panel_ui: Plans tab displays plan cards with Edit/Delete/Toggle buttons
features_tested.plan_modal: Modal for creating/editing plans with all required fields
